description: Progress MOVEit Transfer edge-appliance CVEs — SQL injection (CVE-2023-34362) and authentication bypass (CVE-2024-5806). Detection-only endpoint fingerprints.

moveit_sqli_2023.description: CVE-2023-34362 — MOVEit Transfer SQL injection in the MOVEitISAPI / machine2 interface (Cl0p mass-exploitation). Detection = confirm the moveitisapi.dll endpoint is present; no SQLi payload is sent.

probes.description: moveitisapi.dll responding (200 with MOVEit/machine2 markers) confirms the CVE-2023-34362 SQLi attack surface is exposed. Endpoint fingerprint only.
MOVEit Transfer web client fingerprint (human.aspx portal) — confirms the affected product.

moveit_authbypass_2024.description: CVE-2024-5806 — MOVEit Transfer SFTP-module authentication bypass (improper authentication in the underlying IPWorks SSH). Detection = confirm the MOVEit REST/auth surface; the auth-bypass flow is operator-supervised.

probes.description: MOVEit REST token endpoint present (200/400/401 with MOVEit JSON) = the appliance version family exposing CVE-2024-5806 is reachable. Fingerprint only.
